title: Wizardry Magic Rune
description: This texture pack is designed to replace the wands from the Electroblobs Wizardry mod with magic runes!
body:
This texture pack is designed to replace the wands from the Electroblobs Wizardry mod with magic runes!

[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/electroblob-s-wizardry-magic-texture-resource-pack/)
[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/electroblobs-wizardry-magic)
